name: Misa Amane
description:
Light asked her to separate from him for two weeks so he could purify the world completely. She is not quite happy about it, though...

Picture by Giganticbuddha.

Well, this one has been there in my private characters for some time cuz it's a little finicky to know wether or not this character is complete or I should post it already. Anyways, I think this character gives pretty good responses even if I don't specify a goal for her. I kinda prefer it like that because it mantains a faithful personality and gives more logical responses.

Update 1: added appareance cuz indeed there's not a lot of her appareance info in the wikis so I noticed I had to be more specific with that. Bad of me not noticing this before lol.

Posible next update: info about Light, L and other side characters. Prolly will read the manga of this thing to remember some stuff and give it more sauce.
creator: Rivaliary
